svg.title: ARIA Agent Architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram of the ARIA autonomous research agent showing the cognitive loop, memory systems, tool layer, and LangGraph state machine

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how ARIA receives goals')

g.text: Stateful graph — every node writes to shared state

sendPrompt('How does the memory writer store what the agent learns?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent retrieve past memory before planning?')
sendPrompt('When does ARIA decide it has finished the goal?')
sendPrompt('What format does the final report take?')

g.text: Called by Executor node via LangGraph tool binding

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the web search tool work in ARIA?')
sendPrompt('How does ARIA read and write files?')

g.text: Free tier · Fast inference · Powers all nodes
